name: Ryoshu Doting on You
description:
Putting some much needed balance in my catalogue by having a sweet bot... with Ryoshu of all options.

The acryonyms are always tough when making a Ryoshu bot, but I tried my best. Hopefully she uses them sparingly, at least so it won't be too intrusive to the experience.

Artist credit: Leoderorero

More images because their hot is really hot:

Relatively high effort bot compared to what I was pumping out before the new year. As always, comments, ratings, suggestions for new bots, etc are greatly appreciated. Thinking about making an anonymous questionnaire thing like a strawpage because perhaps people will be less shy there.
creator: EvilAssMf
